input.background: Calculate a chi-square test of association statistic and P-value for the case-control data in Table 18.21.
input.question: Calculate a chi-square test of association statistic and P-value for the case-control data in Table 18.21.

value: Chain (35 or more cigs per day)
Smoking_level.description: The level of smoking habit, categorized into six levels.

Cases.description: The number of cases (individuals with lung cancer) for each smoking level.

Noncases.description: The number of noncases (individuals without lung cancer) for each smoking level.
